case_title: DOROTHY CALVIN VS. POST & ELLIS SERVICES, LLC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT POST & ELLIS SERVICES, LLC. DBA. THE UPS STORE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALVIN, DOROTHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT POST & ELLIS SERVICES, LLC. DBA. THE UPS STORE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $93.75 - SERVED JAN-09-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POST & ELLIS SERVICES, LLC. DBA. THE UPS STORE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALVIN, DOROTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POST & ELLIS SERVICES, LLC. DBA. THE UPS STORE $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $123.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $523.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT POST & ELLIS SERVICES, LLC. DBA. THE UPS STORE HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY CALVIN, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT POST & ELLIS SERVICES, LLC. DBA. THE UPS STORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY POST AND ELLIS SERVICES, LLC DBA THE UPS STORE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
